DP.129.0000:
I’ve been hiking all around the
Sinnoh region.\f
I love planting Berries wherever
I go.\f
I’ll give you a Berry, too.
Please plant it somewhere.\f
DP.129.0001:
Planting Berries is good for
Pokémon.\f
It provides them with more things
to eat in the wild.
DP.129.0002:
My sister gathers Berries every day!
Please come visit again!\f
We cook the Berries, too!
We mix them up! They’re yummy!
